## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` is clean.
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes locally.
- [ ] Public API surface (HTTP endpoints, SSE protocol, exec WebSocket framing,
      env-var configuration) is unchanged, OR the README has been updated.
- [ ] I've read and respected the scope guidance in `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
